name: proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_ps_appdata
raw_query: any where (process.command_line like~ ("*powershell.exe*", "*\\powershell*", "*\\pwsh*", "*pwsh.exe*")) and ((process.command_line:"*/c *" and process.command_line:"*\\AppData\\*") and (process.command_line like~ ("*Local\\*", "*Roaming\\*")))
